entry.title: Epic Games (Game) - The Stone of Madness

ul.p: About the game (The Stone of Madness*):

ul.li: Description: From the studio that brought you the Blasphemous series comes The Stone of Madness: a real-time tactical stealth game set in an 18th-century Spanish Monastery. Located in the Pyrenees, this time-worn Jesuit monastery is home to a madhouse and an inquisitorial prison. Five prisoners - plagued by cruel punishment, madness, and despair - pool their skills and resources to face their phobias, stave off insanity, uncover the mysteries of the Monastery, and find a way to escape.

ul.p: * Any information about the offer is automatically grabbed and may in rare cases not match the correct game.

div.p: Claim it now for free on Epic Games.

p.small: Source: Epic Games, Seen first: 2026-04-16 15:05:04, Generated by LootScraper
